'''Dartessex IV''' was a celestial body<ref name="GG10" /> located in the [[Dartessex system/Legends|Dartessex system]], a part of [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].<ref name="TEA" /> The home offices of [[House Renliss]], a chapter house of the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]], were located at Dartessex IV, leading to the celestial body being considered the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the house.<ref name="GG10" /> Dartessex IV was listed as the Renliss headquarters in an entry for the house included in the [[Bounty Hunters Guild Handbook]].<ref name="BHC">''[[The Bounty Hunter Code: From the Files of Boba Fett]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Dartessex IV was first mentioned in the [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook ''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]'', written by [[Rick D. Stuart]] for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="GG10" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Dartessex [[Star system/Legends|system]], and thereby Dartessex IV, in grid square N-10.<ref name="TEA" />
